description:
Goal: the quicksort semantic-closure frontier should have a provable, intentional partition/4 activation shape.

Signal:
- cargo test --lib compiler2_quicksort_root_closes_with_a_finite_recursive_frontier -- --nocapture passes

Why:
- the failure reproduces on clean HEAD at 4b98938f2, so this is pre-existing branch drift rather than fallout from fz-rh2.8.2.6.
- we need to decide whether the current closure shape is wrong or the test expectation is stale, then make the result explicit.
title: Compiler2 semantics/tests: reconcile quicksort partition activation frontier
